---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the pain point or workflow gap.

**What would the solution look like?**
Describe what you'd like to happen.

**Which part of Joycraft does this affect?**
- [ ] Skills (slash commands)
- [ ] Templates (specs, briefs, workflows)
- [ ] CLI (`init`, `upgrade`, `init-autofix`)
- [ ] CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md generation
- [ ] Level 5 / autofix loop
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

**Additional context**
Any screenshots, links, or examples that help explain the request.
